sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
colors = {}
for n in nodes:
    colors[n['color']] = colors.get(n['color'], 0) + 1
print(f"Colors: {colors}")

# Try clicking on the first pattern cell (center column, row 1)
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 24, 'col': 30}])
print(f"Result: {last_action_result}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
colors = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    colors[n['color']] = colors.get(n['color'], 0) + 1
print(f"Colors after: {colors}")
print(f"Level: {current_frame.level}, Step: {current_frame.step}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
